---
name: New model results
about: Submit benchmark results for a model not yet covered
title: 'Results: <model name>'
labels: new-results
assignees: ''
---

**Model**
- HuggingFace ID: (e.g. `mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3`)
- Size: (e.g. 7B)
- Category: (General / Reasoning / Code / Enterprise)

**Hardware**
- GPU:
- VRAM:
- Instance type (if cloud):

**Engine versions**
- vLLM:
- SGLang:

**Results summary**

| Scenario | vLLM | SGLang |
|---|---|---|
| TTFT median | ms | ms |
| Peak throughput | tok/s | tok/s |

**Notes**
Any engine-specific flags required, OOM issues, or other observations.

**Raw results**
Link to or attach the result JSON files (one per scenario × engine).
